ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the aircraft (e.g., Cessna) */,
  "series" INTEGER /* Series of the aircraft (e.g., 170) */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., 170A) */,
  "eligibility_chart" INTEGER /* Reference to the eligibility chart for the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the aircraft model */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the aircraft model (e.g., commercial, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model associated with the part */,
  "beginning_sn" INTEGER /* Beginning serial number range for the part */,
  "ending_sn" INTEGER /* Ending serial number range for the part */,
  "quantity_per_aircraft" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part required per aircraft */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the part within the facility */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number */,
  "part_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the part */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the part */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the part */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the part available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the part */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity for the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for ordering and receiving the part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier providing the part */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of parts ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., manager, warehouse staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., part, order, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, corrective) */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, deduction) */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity affected by the change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Person who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part being checked */,
  "compliance_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "checked_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_compliance_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location's purpose */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_category_map" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id", "category_id")
)
